scripts.build: node scripts/node/extract-baseline.js && node scripts/node/normalize-shops.js && node scripts/node/inject-schema.js && node build/generateSitemap.js && vite build
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run style
scripts.perf:ci: npm run image-audit && npx playwright test --reporter=list || true
scripts.linkcheck:report: mkdir -p reports && npm run linkcheck --silent > reports/links-current.json || true
scripts.linkcheck:baseline: mkdir -p reports && npm run linkcheck --silent > reports/links-initial.json || true
scripts.linkcheck:dist: mkdir -p reports && linkinator dist --recurse --skip "^https?://(?!localhost|127\.0\.0\.1)" --format json > reports/links-dist.json || true
scripts.preflight: npm run audit-pages && npm run check-links
scripts.validate: node scripts/node/validate-build.js && node scripts/node/check-unsafe-dom.js && node scripts/node/check-seo-meta.js && node scripts/node/check-sw-coverage.js && node scripts/node/enrich-placeholder-pages.js --check && node scripts/node/externalize-analytics.js --check && node scripts/node/inventory-seo.js --check && node scripts/node/inject-schema.js --check
